offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual data entry causes late reports. We automate spend extraction instead of manual spreadsheets and reports.
problem: Manual data entry and spend analysis inefficiencies.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Participate in community forums for accounting tools
try_it: Let users try summary generation and dashboard for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
